playbook.intent: Prototype with usability findings -> updated prototype + logged rationale + ready to retest.
playbook.scope: Designer takes one user flow that has fresh usability feedback and iterates it in 1-3 hours. Includes change list, wireframe update, hi-fi update, interaction wiring, and a rationale log. Done when the prototype is ready for the next test and the rationale entry is filed.

success-criteria.criterion: Change list documented from prior findings
Iteration log entry filed with rationale
Version tag applied to the flow

stage.name: List changes

tasks.task: List each critical finding + proposed change
Flag changes that affect the journey map
Park lower-severity changes for next iteration

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when changes are concrete (no 'improve UX').

stage.name: Update wireframes

tasks.task: Mark steps where copy or affordance changes

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when wireframes match the change list.

stage.name: Update hi-fi
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when hi-fi matches wireframes.

stage.name: Wire interactions

tasks.task: Wire links + transitions for the flow

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when smoke test passes.

stage.name: Log + tag
stage.intent: Future you will thank present you.

tasks.task: File iteration log with rationale per change

stage.decision-gate: Done when log is filed and tag is applied.

extra.value: ['Iterating without a change list -> drift, hard to test what changed', Hi-fi without re-wireframing -> structural issues survive, No version tag -> rollback is impossible]
['Does the prototype actually walk through cleanly?', 'Is the rationale per change written down?', 'Is the version tag applied?']

{human: faion get-content prototype-iteration-on-one-flow-13hr --format md, agent: faion get-content prototype-iteration-on-one-flow-13hr --format context, json: faion get-content prototype-iteration-on-one-flow-13hr --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
